name: nssm
description: Install NSSM (Non-Sucking Service Manager) from nssm-2.24.zip and add to PATH.
verify:
powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$log = Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs
ssm-verify.log'; & 'C:\Program Files
ssm
ssm.exe' 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1 | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs
ssm-smoke.txt') -Value 'nssm_ok'"
